column7: Operational Accounting Definition & Statement Trigger Use Case
Direct P&L Expense Posting: Captures external bank account fees or transaction costs directly from SWIFT Tag 61
Outgoing Subledger Settlement: Debits open check/wire sub-ledgers to balance out ongoing payment items
Incoming Subledger Settlement: Credits open collections sub-ledgers to balance out received customer wire line items
Check Presentation Settlement: Uses the unique check number extracted from Tag 61 to clear the open check ledger
Direct Miscellaneous Income Posting: Real-time recognition of incoming bank credits and monthly interest streams
